---
title: "Szenarien von Pensionsreformen im Überblick"
filters: [remove_title.lua]
anchor-sections: false
# author: "Lukas Schmoigl / Stefan Weingärtner" AK-OOe-Pensionen-PN-23011
execute: 
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

{{< include src/config.qmd >}}
{{< include src/utils.qmd >}}

```{ojs}
import {vl} from "@vega/vega-lite-api-v5" // apiVersion = '5.6.0' vlVersion = '5.6.0' vegaVersion = '5.23.0' tooltipVersion = '0.30.0'
import {aq, op} from '@uwdata/arquero' // version "6.0.0"
```

```{ojs}
descriptions = FileAttachment("data/descriptions.csv").csv({ typed: true })
```

```{ojs}
binsRaw = FileAttachment("data/bins.csv").csv({ typed: true })
scenarios = aq.from(binsRaw)
  .derive({ variable: d => op.replace(d.variable, /\r\n/g, " ") })
  .filter(aq.escape(d => d.variable != "Status quo"))
  .select("variable")
  .dedupe()
  .array("variable")
```

```{ojs}
// echo: false
// warning: false
info = descriptions
  .filter(d => d.variable == select)
  .map(d => d.description)[0]
```


:::::{.container}


::: {.columns .column-page .mainText}
#### RECHNER
# Szenarien von Pensionsreformen im Überblick
## Einfluss auf die individuelle Pensionshöhe
Die Berechnungen der AK OÖ und WIFO zeigen in verschiedenen Szenarien mögliche Stellschrauben für eine Angleichung der Frauenpensionen an Männerpensionen auf. Maecenas turpis velit, ultricies non elementum vel, luctus nec nunc. Nulla a diam interdum, faucibus sapien viverra, finibus metus. Donec non tortor diam. In ut elit aliquet, bibendum sem et, aliquam tortor. Donec congue, sem at rhoncus ultrices, nunc augue cursus erat, quis porttitor mauris libero ut ex. Nullam quis leo urna. Donec faucibus ligula eget pellentesque interdum. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
:::

:::: {.columns .column-page }
::: {.column width="45%"}
```{ojs}
viewof select = Inputs.select(scenarios, {label: "Szenario"})
viewof range = Inputs.range([100, 4200], {label: "Bruttopension", step: 100, value: 1400})
viewof radio = Inputs.radio(["Frauen", "Männer"], {label: "Geschlecht", value: "Frauen"})
viewof check1 = Inputs.checkbox(["Kindererziehungszeiten"], {disabled: select == "Szenario 1 (Kindererziehung)" && radio == "Frauen" ? false : true})
viewof check2 = Inputs.checkbox(["ALV-Zeiten"], {disabled: select == "Szenario 2 (Arbeitslosigkeit)" ? false : true})
viewof interpolate = Inputs.select(["natural", "step"], {label: "Interpolation"})
```
:::
::: {.column width="55%" .infoText}
![](img/Infobox_info_icon.svg){height=14px} Szenario: ${info} <br><br>
![](img/Infobox_info_icon.svg){height=14px} [Ihre genaue Pensionshöhe können Sie hier errechnen lassen](https://pensionsrechner.arbeiterkammer.at/pkr-on2/){target="_blank"} 
:::
::::

```{ojs}
binsMid = aq.from(binsRaw)
  .derive({ 
    variable: d => op.replace(d.variable, /\r\n/g, " "),
    bin: d => d.bin * 100,
    range: aq.escape(d => range),
    radio: aq.escape(d => radio),
  })

cumPerc = binsMid
  .derive({
    tail: aq.escape(
      d => d.bin < range ? "lower" : 
      d.bin > range ? "higher" : "same"
      )
  })
  .groupby(["gesl", "variable", "tail"])
  .rollup({ N: d => op.sum(d.N) })
  .groupby(["gesl", "variable"])
  .derive({ perc: d => d.N / op.sum(d.N) })
  .groupby(["gesl", "variable", "tail"])
  .derive({ text: aq.escape(d => d3.format(",.0~%")(d.perc)) })
  .objects()

function getCumPerc(gesl, tail) {
  const out = cumPerc
  .filter(d => 
    d.gesl == gesl &&
    d.tail == tail && 
    d.variable == "Status quo"
    )
  .map(d => d.text)
  return out
}
```

```{ojs}
decilesRaw = 
  check1[0] == "Kindererziehungszeiten" ?
  FileAttachment("data/deciles_betroffen_szen1.csv").csv({ typed: true }) :
  check2[0] == "ALV-Zeiten" ?
  FileAttachment("data/deciles_betroffen_szen1.csv").csv({ typed: true }) :
  FileAttachment("data/deciles.csv").csv({ typed: true })

decilesList = [
  "Gesamt",
  "10. Dezil",
  // "25. Dezil",
  "20. Dezil",
  "30. Dezil",
  "40. Dezil",
  "50. Dezil",
  "60. Dezil",
  "70. Dezil",
  "80. Dezil",
  // "75. Dezil",
  "90. Dezil",
]

decilesMid = aq.from(decilesRaw)
  .derive({ 
    variable: d => op.replace(d.variable, /\r\n/g, " "),
    select: aq.escape(d => select),
    range: aq.escape(d => range),
    radio: aq.escape(d => radio),
    diff: aq.escape(d => Math.abs(range-d.value)),
  })
  .filter(aq.escape(d => decilesList.includes(d.D)))
  .groupby(["gesl", "val", "variable"])
  .derive({ closestDecile: d => op.min(d.diff) == d.diff && d.gesl == d.radio && d.val == "Status quo" ? 1 : 0 })
  .groupby(["gesl", "variable", "D"])
  .derive({ closestDecile: d => op.sum(d.closestDecile) > 0 ? "yes" : "no" })
  .ungroup()

decilesDiffVal = decilesMid
  .filter(aq.escape(d => d.variable == select))
  .select(["gesl", "D", "variable", "val", "value"])
  .groupby(["gesl", "D", "variable"])
  .pivot("val", "value")
  .derive({ 
    diffScenario: d => d["Szenario"] - d["Status quo"],
    diffScenarioPerc: d => (d["Szenario"] - d["Status quo"]) / d["Status quo"],
  })

closestDecileValue = decilesMid
  .filter(aq.escape(d => d.variable == select))
  .objects()
  .filter(d => d.closestDecile == "yes")
  .map(d => d.D)[0]

decilesDiffGesl = decilesMid
  .derive({ closestDecileValue: aq.escape(d => closestDecileValue) })
  .select(["gesl", "D", "variable", "val", "value"])
  .groupby(["val", "D", "variable"])
  .pivot("gesl", "value")
  .derive({ 
    gapValue: d => d.Männer - d.Frauen,
    gapPerc: d => (d.Männer - d.Frauen) / (d.Männer),
    gapRel: d => (d.Frauen) / (d.Männer),
  })

deciles = decilesMid
  .derive({ closestDecileValue: aq.escape(d => closestDecileValue) })
  .join_left(decilesDiffVal, [["gesl", "D", "variable"], ["gesl", "D", "variable"]])
  .join_left(decilesDiffGesl, [["val", "D", "variable"], ["val", "D", "variable"]])
  .objects()

diffScenario = deciles
  .filter(d => d.variable == select)
  .filter(d => d.gesl == radio && d.val == "Szenario" && d.D == d.closestDecileValue)
  .map(d => d.diffScenario)

medians = decilesMid
  .filter(aq.escape(d => d.D == "50. Dezil"))
  .derive({ 
    variable: d => d.val == "Szenario" ? d.variable : "Status quo",
    median: d => d.value,
    })
  .select(["gesl", "variable", "val", "median"])
  .dedupe()

bins = binsMid
  .join_left(medians, [["gesl", "variable"], ["gesl", "variable"]])
  .objects()
```


:::: {.columns .column-page }
:::{.column width="70%"}
Platzierung in Verteilung
```{ojs}
distributions = {

  const area = vl
    .markArea({
      interpolate: interpolate,
      fillOpacity: 0.4,
      strokeWidth: 1.75,
      clip: true,
    })
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("bin")
        .axis({
          grid: false,
          title: "Bruttopension"
        })
        .scale({
          domain: [0, 4200],
          nice: false,
        }),
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("N")
        .scale({
          domain: [0, 22000],
        })
        .axis({
          domain: false,
          grid: false,
          title: "Anzahl Personen"
        }),
      vl.color()
        .fieldN("gesl")
        .scale({
          range: colors,
        })
        .legend({
          orient: "top", 
          symbolOpacity: 1,
          symbolType: "square",
          title: null,
        }),
      vl.stroke()
        .fieldN("gesl")
        .scale({
          range: radio == "Männer" ? ["transparent", "black"] : ["black", "transparent"],
        })
        .legend(null),
    )

  const areaLowTail = vl
    .markArea({
      interpolate: interpolate,
      fillOpacity: 0.75,
      strokeWidth: 2,
      clip: true,
    })
    .transform(
      vl.filter("datum.bin <= datum.range"),
      vl.filter("datum.gesl == datum.radio"),
    )
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("bin"),
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("N"),
      vl.color()
        .fieldN("gesl")
        .scale({
          range: colors,
        })
        .legend(null),
    )

  const rule = vl
    .markRule({
      stroke: "black",
      strokeDash: [4, 2],
      clip: true,
    })
    .transform(
      vl.filter("datum.bin == datum.range")
    )
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("bin")
    )

  const ruleGray = vl
    .markRule({
      stroke: "gray",
      strokeOpacity: 0.7,
      clip: true,
    })
    .transform(vl.filter("datum.bin == 100")) // choose random bin
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("median")
    )

  const textGray1 = vl
    .markText({
      color: "gray",
      opacity: 0.7,
      size: 13,
      y: 30,
      dx: -10,
      align: "right",
      clip: true,
    })
    .transform(vl.filter("datum.bin == 100")) // choose random bin
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("median"),
      vl.text()
        .fieldQ("median")
        .format(",.0f"),
    )

  const textGray2 = vl
    .markText({
      color: "gray",
      opacity: 0.7,
      size: 10,
      y: 45,
      dx: -10,
      align: "right",
      clip: true,
    })
    .transform(vl.filter("datum.bin == 100")) // choose random bin
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("median"),
      vl.text()
        .value("Median"),
    )

  const textGray3 = vl
    .markText({
      color: "gray",
      opacity: 0.7,
      size: 10,
      y: 55,
      dx: -10,
      align: "right",
      clip: true,
    })
    .transform(vl.filter("datum.bin == 100")) // choose random bin
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("median"),
      vl.text()
        .fieldN("gesl"),
    )

  const textLeft = vl
    .markText({
      clip: true,
      size: 14,
      y: 10,
      dx: -12,
      align: "right",
      clip: true,
    })
    .transform(
      vl.filter("datum.gesl == datum.radio"),
      vl.filter("datum.bin == datum.range"),
    )
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("bin"),
      vl.text()
        .value("← " + getCumPerc(radio, "lower")), 
    )

  const textRight = vl
    .markText({
      clip: true,
      size: 14,
      y: 10,
      dx: 12,
      align: "left",
      clip: true,
    })
    .transform(
      vl.filter("datum.gesl == datum.radio"),
      vl.filter("datum.bin == datum.range"),
    )
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("bin"),
      vl.text()
        .value(getCumPerc(radio, "higher") + " →"), 
    )

  const textSame = vl
    .markText({
      clip: true,
      size: 14,
      y: 26,
      dy: -12,
      align: "right",
      clip: true,
      angle: -90,
    })
    .transform(
      vl.filter("datum.gesl == datum.radio"),
      vl.filter("datum.bin == datum.range"),
    )
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("bin"),
      vl.text()
        .value("≈ " + getCumPerc(radio, "same")), 
    )

  return vl
    .layer(
      ruleGray,
      textGray1,
      textGray2,
      textGray3,
      area,
      areaLowTail,
      rule,
      textLeft,
      textRight,
      textSame,
    )
    .height(280)
    .width(makeWidth(width)/1.7)
    .facet({
      field: "variable", 
      type: "nominal", 
      title: null,
      header: { 
        labelFontSize: 14, 
        orient: "top",
      },
    })
    .data(bins.filter(d => d.variable == "Status quo"))
    .config(config)
    .render({ renderer: "svg" })

}
```
:::

:::{.column width="30%"}
Veränderung durch Szenario
```{ojs}
distributionsChange = {

  const area = vl
    .markArea({
      interpolate: interpolate,
      strokeWidth: 1.25,
    })
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("bin")
        .axis({
          grid: false,
          title: "Bruttopension"
        })
        .scale({
          domain: [0, 4200],
          nice: false,
        }),
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("N")
        .scale({
          domain: [0, 19000],
        })
        .axis({
          domain: false,
          grid: false,
          title: null,
          ticks: false,
          labels: false,
          nice: false,
         //  minExtent: 20,
        }),
      vl.color()
        .fieldN("gesl")
        .scale({
          range: colors,
        })
        .legend(null),
      vl.stroke()
        .fieldN("gesl")
        .scale({
          range: radio == "Männer" ? ["transparent", "black"] : ["black", "transparent"],
        })
        .legend(null), 
      vl.fillOpacity()
        .fieldN("variable")
        .scale({
          range: [0.7, 0.4]
        })
        .legend(null),
      vl.strokeOpacity()
        .fieldN("variable")
        .scale({
          range: [1, 0]
        })
        .legend(null),
    )

  const areaLowTail = vl
    .markArea({
      interpolate: interpolate,
      fillOpacity: 0.75,
      strokeWidth: 2,
    })
    .transform(
      vl.filter("datum.bin <= datum.range"),
      vl.filter("datum.gesl == datum.radio"),
    )
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("bin"),
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("N"),
      vl.color()
        .fieldN("gesl")
        .scale({
          range: colors,
        })
        .legend(null),
    )

  const rule = vl
    .markRule({
      stroke: "black",
      strokeDash: [4, 2],
    })
    .transform(
      vl.filter("datum.bin == datum.range")
    )
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("bin")
    )
    
  return vl
    .layer(
      area,
      // areaLowTail,
      // rule,
    )
    .height(114.5)
    .width(makeWidth(width)/4)
    .facet({
      field: "gesl", 
      type: "nominal", 
      title: null,
      header: { 
        labelFontSize: 14, 
        orient: "top",
      },
    })
    .resolve({
      axis: {x: "independent"}
      })
    .columns(1)
    .data(
      bins
        .filter(d => d.variable == select || d.variable == "Status quo")
      )
    .config(config)
    .render({ renderer: "svg" })

}
checkText1 = check1.length == 1 ? ", die Kinderbetreuungszeiten vorweisen können," : ""
```
:::
::::

:::: {.columns .column-page }
:::{.column width="70%"}
```{ojs}
bars = {

  const bar = vl
    .markBar({
      strokeWidth: 1.75,
      strokeOpacity: 1,
    })
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldN("D")
        .sort("value") 
        .axis({
          grid: false,
          title: null,
        }), 
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .scale({
          domain: [0, 4400],
        })
        .axis({
          domain: false,
          grid: false,
          title: "Bruttopension",
        }),
      vl.xOffset()
        .fieldN("val"),
      vl.color()
        .fieldN("val")
        .scale({
          range: colors,
        })
        .legend({
          orient: "top",
          symbolOpacity: 1,
          symbolType: "square",
          title: null,
        }),
      vl.stroke()
        .fieldN("closestDecile")
        .scale({
          range: ["transparent", "black"]
        })
        .legend(null),
      vl.opacity()
        .fieldN("closestDecile")
        .scale({
          range: [0.4, 0.7]
        })
        .legend(null),
    )

  const text = vl
    .markText({
      clip: true,
      size: 12,
      y: 280-18,
      angle: -90,
    })
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldO("D"),
      // vl.y()
      //   .fieldQ("value"),
      vl.xOffset()
        .fieldN("val"),
      vl.text()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .format(",.0~f"),
      vl.opacity()
        .fieldN("closestDecile")
        .scale({
          range: [0.5, 0.7]
        })
        .legend(null),
    )

  const textDiff = vl
    .markText({
      clip: true,
      size: 12,
      dy: -12,
      align: "center",
    })
    .transform(vl.filter("datum.val == 'Szenario'"))
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldO("D"),
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("value"),
      vl.text()
        .fieldQ("diffScenario")
        .format("+,.0~f"),
      vl.opacity()
        .fieldN("closestDecile")
        .scale({
          range: [0.5, 0.7]
        })
        .legend(null),
    )

  const textDiffPerc = vl
    .markText({
      clip: true,
      size: 12,
      dy: -28,
      align: "center",
    })
    .transform(vl.filter("datum.val == 'Szenario'"))
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldO("D"),
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("value"),
      vl.text()
        .fieldQ("diffScenarioPerc")
        .format("+,.0~%"),
      vl.opacity()
        .fieldN("closestDecile")
        .scale({
          range: [0.5, 0.7]
        })
        .legend(null),
    )

  return vl 
    .layer(
      bar,
      text,
      textDiff,
      textDiffPerc,
    )
    .height(280)
    .width(makeWidth(width)/1.7)
    .facet({
      field: "gesl", 
      type: "nominal", 
      title: null,
      header: { 
        labelFontSize: 14, 
        orient: "top",
      },
    })
    .data(deciles.filter(d => d.variable == select && d.gesl == radio))
    .config(config)
    .render({ renderer: "svg" })

}
```
:::

:::{.column width="30%"}
```{ojs}
dumbbell = {

  const points = vl
    .markPoint({
      size: 50,
      opacity: 1,
      shape: "square",
    })
    // .transform(vl.filter("datum.D == datum.closestDecileValue"))
    .encode(
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .axis({
          title: "Bruttopension",
          title: null,
          domain: false,
          grid: false,
        })
        .scale({
          domain: [0, 4400]
        }),
      vl.x()
        .fieldO("val")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          // domain: false,
          // labels: false,
          // ticks: false,
        }),
      vl.fill()
        .fieldN("gesl")
        .scale({
          range: colors,
        })
        .legend({
          orient: "top", 
          symbolOpacity: 1,
          symbolType: "square",
          title: null, 
        }),
      vl.color()
        .fieldN("gesl")
        .scale({
          range: colors,
        })
        .legend({
          orient: "top", 
          symbolOpacity: 1,
          symbolType: "square",
          title: null,
        }),
    )

  const lines = vl
    .markLine({
      opacity: 0.15,
      size: 5,
    })
    // .transform(vl.filter("datum.D == datum.closestDecileValue"))
    .encode(
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("value"),
      vl.x()
        .fieldO("val"),
      vl.color()
        .fieldN("val")
        .scale({
          range: ["black", "black"]
        })
        .legend(null),
    )

  const text = vl
    .markText({
      size: 12,
      dx: 25,
    })
    .encode(
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("value"),
      vl.x()
        .fieldO("val"),
      vl.color()
        .fieldN("gesl")
        .scale({
          range: ["black"],
        })
        .legend(null),
      vl.text()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .format(",.0f"),
    )

  const textRel = vl
    .markText({
      size: 12,
      dx: 25,
      dy: 16,
    })
    .encode(
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("value"),
      vl.x()
        .fieldO("val"),
      vl.text()
        .fieldQ("gapRel")
        .format(",.0~%"),
      vl.opacity()
        .fieldN("gesl")
        .scale({
          range : [0.5, 0] 
        })
        .legend(null),
    )

  const textGap = vl
    .markText({
      size: 12,
      dx: 35,
      dy: -16,
      angle: -90,
      align: "right",
    })
    .encode(
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("value"),
      vl.x()
        .fieldO("val"),
      vl.text()
        .fieldQ("gapValue")
        .format(",.0~f"),
      vl.opacity()
        .fieldN("gesl")
        .scale({
          range : [1, 0]
        })
        .legend(null),
    )

  const textArrow = vl
    .markText({
      size: 12,
      dx: 40,
      dy: -16,
      angle: -90,
      align: "left",
    })
    .encode(
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("value"),
      vl.x()
        .fieldO("val"),
      vl.text()
        .value(" →"),
      vl.opacity()
        .fieldN("gesl")
        .scale({
          range : [1, 0]
        })
        .legend(null),
    )

  return vl 
    .layer(
      lines,
      points,
      text,
      textRel,
      textGap,
      textArrow,
    )
    .resolve({
      scale: {color: "independent", fill: "independent"},
    })
    .height(280)
    .width(makeWidth(width)/7)
    .facet({
      field: "closestDecileValue", 
      type: "nominal", 
      title: null,
      header: { 
        labelFontSize: 14, 
        orient: "top",
      },
    })
    // .columns(1)
    .data(deciles.filter(d => d.D == d.closestDecileValue && d.variable == select))
    .config(config)
    .render({ renderer: "svg" })

}
```
:::
::::

::: {.columns .column-page .mainText}
Etwa ${getCumPerc("Frauen", "lower")} aller Frauen und ${getCumPerc("Männer", "lower")} aller Männer haben im Status quo eine niedrigere Pension als ${range} Euro pro Monat (gleich viel ${getCumPerc("Frauen", "same")}, bzw. ${getCumPerc("Männer", "same")} und mehr ${getCumPerc("Frauen", "higher")}, bzw. ${getCumPerc("Männer", "higher")}). 
Im Szenario ${select} würde sich die Verteilung der ${radio} nach rechts verschieben. ${radio} mit einer Pension von ${range} Euro befindet sich am nähesten am ${deciles.map(d => d.closestDecileValue)[0] }. Im ${select} würden ${radio + checkText1} dort im Schnitt um ${Math.round(diffScenario)} mehr Pension erhalten.
Der Gender Pension Gap würde damit im ${deciles.map(d => d.closestDecileValue)[0]} von ${d3.format(".0f")(deciles.filter(d => d.D == d.closestDecileValue && d.val == "Status quo").map(d => d.gapValue)[0])} Euro auf ${d3.format(".0f")(deciles.filter(d => d.D == d.closestDecileValue && d.val == "Szenario").map(d => d.gapValue)[0])} Euro fallen. Damit würde die Frauenpension hier ${d3.format(".0%")(deciles.filter(d => d.D == d.closestDecileValue && d.val == "Szenario").map(d => d.gapRel)[0])} statt ${d3.format(".0%")(deciles.filter(d => d.D == d.closestDecileValue && d.val == "Status quo").map(d => d.gapRel)[0])} relativ zur Männerpension ausmachen.
:::

::: {.columns .column-page .mainText}
## Einfluss auf die Haushaltseinkommen
Maecenas turpis velit, ultricies non elementum vel, luctus nec nunc. Nulla a diam interdum, faucibus sapien viverra, finibus metus. Donec non tortor diam. In ut elit aliquet, bibendum sem et, aliquam tortor. Donec congue, sem at rhoncus ultrices, nunc augue cursus erat, quis porttitor mauris libero ut ex. Nullam quis leo urna. Donec faucibus ligula eget pellentesque interdum. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
:::

```{ojs}
hhIncome = FileAttachment("data/household_income_detail.csv").csv({ typed: true })
hhPoverty = FileAttachment("data/household_arop_detail.csv").csv({ typed: true })

groups = aq.from(hhIncome)
  .filter(aq.escape(d => d.group != "Gesamt"))
  .select("group")
  .dedupe()
  .array("group")

hhIncome
```

:::: {.columns .column-page }
::: {.column width="45%"}
```{ojs}
viewof selectGroup = Inputs.select(groups, {label: "Merkmale"})
```
:::
::: {.column width="55%" .infoText}

:::
::::

:::: {.columns .column-page }
:::{.column width="70%"}
```{ojs}
barsIncome = {

  const text = vl
    .markText()
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldN("variable")
    )

  return vl 
    .layer(
      bars,    )
    .width(makeWidth(width)/5)
    // .facet({
    //   field: "closestDecileValue", 
    //   type: "nominal", 
    //   title: null,
    //   header: { 
    //     labelFontSize: 14, 
    //     orient: "top",
    //   },
    // })
    // .columns(1)
    .data(hhIncome)
    .config(config)
    .render({ renderer: "svg" })
}
```
:::
::::

:::::
